offer: For clinic billing specialists processing 10–20 claims/month, frequent claim denials cause cash flow gaps. We automate the resubmission process instead of manual tracking and resubmission of claims.
problem: Frequent claim denials and resubmissions lead to delayed payments.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for clinic billing specialists
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions about billing workflows
DM outreach to clinic billing specialists with demo video
Join community forums for sharing billing tools
try_it: Let users try claim tracking dashboard and manual entry option for claims on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a 1-page landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing claims
